chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1262 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.4990/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 29-09-2025 On 22-09-2025 the following order was passed;- “None present for the Petitioner and no intimation has been received, this petition is liable to be dismissed in non-prosecution. However, in the interest of justice, the matter adjourned to 29-09- 2025. Let the intimation notice be issued to the petitioner.” Despite intimation notice to the Petitioner no one has turned up to pursue this Petition diligently. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
